summary: SEC-6.2 provenance argument rewritten to lead with 2πR relationship (40,030 = 2π × 6,371.0 to 170 m / 0.0004%) instead of weaker equatorial circumference comparison (45 km gap). Added algebraic tautology showing v=D/T=2πR/T=C/T. Fixed Cummer 2000 DOI from IET to IEEE TAP (10.1109/8.898776). Flagged velocity rounding discrepancy (1.5739c computed vs 1.574c claimed). Inline summary of Section 2.9 πR finding added.
